---
title: "About"
format: html
---

## Introduction

{{< include includes/about_intro.qmd >}}

## Current Work

- Election-focused visualizations and polling aggregation products.
- Web interfaces that make complex analysis accessible to non-technical audiences.
- Reproducible content pipelines using Python and Quarto.

## Studies and Focus Areas

- **CEU - Data and Society (BA)**: quantitative social science, data analysis, and research design.
- **Thematic focus**: voting behavior, mandate estimation, and polling quality.
- **Technical focus**: Python, pandas, SQL, Quarto, and web data visualization.

## Selected Work

- [Vox Populi: US 2024 tracker](projects/vox-populi-us2024.qmd)
- [Vox Populi: Választás 2026](projects/vox-populi-valasztas-2026.qmd)
- [Predictive election needle (444)](projects/444-election-needle-2021.qmd)
- [TestVot 2025](projects/testvot-2025.qmd)

## Links

- [Projects](projects/index.qmd)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/hidegmisi/)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/mihaly-hideg)
